title: deschampsia littoralis
intro: Deschampsia littoralis, also known as Saltmarsh Hairgrass or Salt-marsh Brome, is a perennial grass native to coastal regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Deschampsia littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
